message: build: update MCP runtime for swift-sdk 0.12

files.patch:
@@ -39,8 +39,8 @@ var targets: [Target] = [
             .product(name: "Swiftdansi", package: "Swiftdansi"),
             ],
             path: "Sources/PeekabooCLI",
-        swiftSettings: cliConcurrencySettings),
-    .executableTarget(
+            swiftSettings: cliConcurrencySettings),
+        .executableTarget(
         name: "peekaboo",
         dependencies: [
             "PeekabooCLI",
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ let package = Package(
     ],
     dependencies: [
         .package(path: "../../Commander"),
-        .package(url: "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/swift-sdk.git", "0.11.0" ..< "0.12.0"),
+        .package(url: "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/swift-sdk.git", "0.12.0" ..< "0.13.0"),
         .package(url: "https://github.com/dominicegginton/Spinner", from: "2.1.0"),
         .package(url: "https://github.com/swiftlang/swift-subprocess.git", from: "0.2.1"),
         .package(path: "../../TauTUI"),

@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ let package = Package(
                 .product(name: "Sparkle", package: "Sparkle"),
             ],
             path: "Peekaboo",
-            exclude: ["PeekabooApp.swift", "Info.plist", "Features/StatusBar/README.md", "AppIcon.icon-source"],
+            exclude: ["PeekabooApp.swift", "Info.plist", "Features/StatusBar/README.md"],
             resources: [
                 .process("Assets.xcassets"),
             ],

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ final class AudioRecorder: NSObject {
     var isRecording = false
     var transcript = ""
     var isAvailable = true
-    var error: Error?
+    var error: (any Error)?
 
     private var audioEngine = AVAudioEngine()
     private var audioFile: AVAudioFile?

@@ -78,7 +78,7 @@ final class SpeechRecognizer: NSObject, SFSpeechRecognizerDelegate {
     var isListening = false
     var transcript = ""
     var isAvailable = false
-    var error: Error?
+    var error: (any Error)?
 
     /// Recognition mode
     var recognitionMode: RecognitionMode = .native

@@ -1 +1 @@
-Subproject commit 02b70ea80acb141c6a581778f8ba9d8c0b83776e
+Subproject commit 814e15f4fe2a5e6403987feafd63c767770e8d52
